items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #3' requires deterministic validation of the scenario behavior, specifically regarding graceful degradation when the agent is confused. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete results or traces that confirm the expected behavior or failure report. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide sufficient context or evidence to assess the outcome of this scenario, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
